zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Robert Sherburne於大約1435年出生在英國藍卡爾斯托爾斯特時，他的父親Richard II Sherburne30歲，母親Alice de Hamerton24歲。他於1445年與Joan Radcliffe在英國藍卡爾結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1492年8月29日享年58歲。

nameMeanings.name: Sherburne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Lancashire): habitational name from any of several places called with Old English scīr ‘bright, clear’ + burna ‘stream’, including Sherburn in Elmet (Yorkshire), Sherburn (East Yorkshire, Durham), Shirburn (Oxfordshire), Sherborne (Dorset, Gloucestershire), Sherborne Saint John, Monk Sherborne (Hampshire), Sherbourne (Warwickshire), Sherbourne in Albury (Surrey), and Sherborne in Litton (Somerset). This surname is now rare in Britain.

variants.name: Sherbon
meanings: English: variant of Sherburne with loss of the second -r- by dissimilation. This form of the surname is now rare in Britain.

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Robert Sherburne was born about 1435, in Stonyhurst, Lancashire, England, his father, Richard II Sherburne, was 30 and his mother, Alice de Hamerton, was 24. He married Joan Radcliffe in 1445, in Lancashire, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 29 August 1492, at the age of 58.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Robert Sherburne est né environ 1435, à Stonyhurst, Lancashire, Angleterre, son père, Richard II Sherburne, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Alice de Hamerton, avait 24 ans. Il a épousé Joan Radcliffe en 1445, à Lancashire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 29 août 1492, à l’âge de 58 ans.

Lui sposato Joan Radcliffe nel 1445, nel Lancashire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 29 agosto 1492, all'età di 58 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Robert Sherburne(이)가 대략 1435년 영국 랭카실르 스토니후르스트에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Richard II Sherburne(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Alice de Hamerton(은)는 24세였다. 그는 1445년 영국 랭카실르에서 Joan Radcliffe(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1492년 8월 29일 58세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Robert Sherburne родился около 1435 г. в местности стонихурст, ланкашир, Англия, его отцу по имени Richard II Sherburne было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice de Hamerton, 24. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan Radcliffe в 1445 г. в местности ланкашир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер 29 августа 1492 г. в возрасте 58 лет.
